/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -std=c++11 -march=native -O2 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main_test.dir/main_test.cpp.o -o main_test   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/root/ATF4NN_New3/res/edgenext/nnfusion_rt/cuda_codegen/build /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a libnnfusion_naive_rt.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudnn.so
